build.buildCommand: install-php-extensions intl zip pdo_mysql && composer install --optimize-autoloader --no-scripts --no-interaction && npm install && npm prune --omit=dev --ignore-scripts && npm run build && mkdir -p storage/framework/{sessions,views,cache,testing} storage/logs bootstrap/cache && chmod -R a+rw storage && php artisan config:cache && php artisan event:cache && php artisan route:cache && php artisan view:cache

deploy.startCommand: php artisan migrate --force && php artisan storage:link 2>/dev/null; /start-container.sh
